basis: CIF NWE / Dated Brent physical proxy
note: Crude is caught between two forces. The 27 June escalation — a second tanker hit (M/T Kiku) and U.S. airstrikes on Iran — puts a war-risk floor under prices, while heavy speculative short positioning, betting the ceasefire holds and supply stays ample (Saudi loadings resumed, Atlantic-basin barrels flowing), is capping them. Physical NWE differentials firm on the risk; flat price is range-bound and headline-sensitive. Editorial proxy, not a traded quote — indicative, and watch tanker-transit data over the rhetoric.
